name: get-design-done
description: Agent-orchestrated 5-stage design pipeline: Scan → Discover → Plan → Design → Verify. 17+ specialized agents, Figma + Refero MCP connections, and standalone commands (style, darkmode, compare, analyze-dependencies, skill-manifest, extract-learnings). Embeds NNG heuristics, WCAG thresholds, typographic systems, motion framework, anti-pattern catalog, and a queryable intel store for O(1) design surface lookups.
